 Options View Legend Legend
Racenet Form Abbreviations
Legend
  • t = Won @ track
  • d = Won @ distance
  • HT = Home Track
  • o = Last or not in first nine last start
  • s = Won on soft
  • h = Won on heavy
  • n = Won at night
  • b = Beaten favourite latest run
  • (G) = Gelded
  • D/A = Dual Acceptors
Last 10 Results
  • x = Spell
  • F = Failed to finish
  • L = Lost rider
Abbreviations For Video Comments
  • App = approaching
  • H/Out = Hung Out
  • MF = midfield
  • S/A = slow away
  • TAL = tearaway leader
  • WB = well back
  • COT = Change of tactics
  • H/S = Hampered Start
  • MSG = Made some ground
  • SG = saved ground
  • t'out = throughout
  • Wd = weakened
  • DRO = didn't run on
  • J awk = Jumped awkwardly
  • NC = no cover
  • U/p = Under Pressure
  • tt = to turn
  • WPFT = Winning post first time
  • DGO = didn't go on
  • k-up = knocked up
  • O/L = outside lead
  • S/L = shared lead
  • u/u = used up
  • D/N = did nothing
  • L = lengths
  • O/R = over-raced
  • Strt = straight
  • WTMF = worse than midfield
  • H/In = Hung In
  • Lpos = lost position
  • ROS = Ran strongly in straight
  • t = turn
  • W = wide
  • WNC = wide no cover
Abbreviations for Pace of race
  • OPF = On Pace Favoured
  • BMF = Backmarkers favoured
  • F = Fair
Abbreviations for Track Analysis
  • TF = Track fair
  • BGW = Best going out wide
  • BGI = Best going inside
Print

R1 Midway Handicap

1300m
Class: 5-Y-O & Up, BM72, Handicap
Resulted
Tips & Race Analysis
Pro Tips
Free Tips
Greg Polson

Top Tip

27/03/26
6th
15. Killer Kerr
R1
Rosehill Gardens
28/03/26
Resulted
Units Staked Units
Profit

We adopt a unit betting system. Profits are calculated by units won multiplied by the unit value.

All calculations assume a $10 per unit staked.

 Bet Type Tipped Price Price
What is the Tipped Price?

The Tipped Price is the odds that were available when the Expert placed their tip. This allows you to see if the odds have fluctuated since the Expert placed their tip.

 Units Won
2 To Win $51.00 -2

Rosehill KILLER KERR (Race 1 No. 15) Is huge odds in early betting but has a couple of things in his favour. Needs a wet track to do his best and will certainly get a track with some give in it on Saturday. Should be at his peak third up and there is a spike in his ratings at the same stage of a preparation and has one of the best last 12 months rating in this field. Expecting a much better run than the $51 in early betting would suggest.

James Molony

WINNER

28/03/26

10. Annie'S Rose

We adopt a unit betting system. Profits are calculated by units won multiplied by the unit value.

What is the Tipped Price?

The Tipped Price is the odds that were available when the Expert placed their tip. This allows you to see if the odds have fluctuated since the Expert placed their tip.

 Units Won
6 To Win Best Tote +13.2

Rosehill R1 no. 10- ANNIES ROSE looks ready to peak third up this campaign after settling last in a slowly run Benchmark 78 Handicap for the Mares over 1300m at Randwick before clocking the quickest last 400m and 200m splits in the race.
